## If you're proposing a new platform/site

Paste the DOM probe output for the platform (open the relevant page in Chrome and run the probe from CONTRIBUTING.md). At minimum we need to know:

- Does the page use a standard `<video>` element? (Yes / No / partial)
- How many `<video>` elements are mounted and which one is the visible playing one?
- Are there any autoplay restrictions / gestures required?

```
<paste output here>
```
